visual_summary: A massive, high-ceilinged marble hall within the Grand Zodangan palace. The architecture is characterized by opulence and scale, featuring a central ceremonial dais and a throne serving as the Jeddak's seat of power. High windows punctuate the vertical space, one of which is noted as shattered.
layout_notes: Massive scale with high-ceilinged marble architecture; features a central ceremonial dais and a throne/seat of power. Includes high windows (one shattered).
lighting: Brilliantly illuminated; high-key lighting designed to showcase wealth and power.
mood: Shifts from ceremonial splendor to chaotic combat characterized by dust and smoke.
constraints: Lighting must transition from high-key splendor to combat-driven chaos (dust/smoke).
Must maintain a sense of massive scale and wealth.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific architectural details of the throne or dais beyond their presence.
Exact nature of the "golden ceremonial chains" (functional vs. decorative).
